info.title: UseZombie Control Plane API
info.description: Agent Delivery Control Plane — spec-to-PR automation via Echo -> Scout -> Warden pipeline.

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: CLI login flow via device-code style sessions and GitHub OAuth

tags.name: Workspaces
tags.description: Create and manage workspaces (one workspace per repo)

tags.name: Specs
tags.description: Spec lifecycle — list, sync, and manage specification documents

tags.name: Runs
tags.description: Core spec-to-PR pipeline — queue, monitor, stream, retry, and cancel runs

tags.name: Agents
tags.description: Agent profiles, trust scores, improvement reports, and self-tuning proposals

tags.name: Harness
tags.description: Agent runtime configuration — author, compile, and activate harness configs

tags.name: Credentials
tags.description: BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) LLM provider credentials

tags.name: Skill Secrets
tags.description: Per-skill secret storage for agent skill integrations

tags.name: Agent Relay
tags.description: Spec generation and preview via LLM — streaming endpoints for interactive authoring

tags.name: Admin
tags.description: Platform-wide configuration — manage shared LLM provider keys

tags.name: Billing
tags.description: Plan upgrades, billing events, and scoring configuration

get.description: Returns service health status including database connectivity and current commit SHA.

commit.description: Git commit SHA of the running build

get.description: Kubernetes-style readiness probe. Returns detailed status of all dependencies including queue health metrics.

ready.description: Overall readiness — true only when all dependencies are healthy

queue_depth.description: Current number of items in the work queue

oldest_queued_age_ms.description: Age in milliseconds of the oldest queued item, null if queue is empty

queue_depth_breached.description: True if queue depth exceeds the configured limit

queue_age_breached.description: True if oldest queued item exceeds the configured age limit

queue_depth_limit.description: Configured queue depth threshold, null if unconfigured

queue_age_limit_ms.description: Configured queue age threshold in milliseconds, null if unconfigured

get.description: Returns Prometheus-format metrics for scraping by monitoring infrastructure.

post.description: Creates a device-code style auth session. Returns a session ID and a login URL to present to the user in their browser.

login_url.description: URL to open in the user's browser to complete authentication

get.description: Polls a pending auth session. The CLI calls this repeatedly until status transitions to 'complete' (token available) or 'expired'.

token.description: Bearer token, present only when status is 'complete'

post.description: Called by the web frontend after successful OAuth to attach a token to the pending session. The CLI's next poll will receive the token.

get.description: Handles the GitHub OAuth redirect. Exchanges the authorization code for an access token and redirects the user back to the app.

302.description: Redirect to application after successful OAuth exchange

post.description: Creates a new workspace linked to a GitHub repository. Returns the workspace ID and a GitHub App install URL if the app is not yet installed on the repo.

default_branch.description: Default branch name, defaults to 'main' if omitted

install_url.description: GitHub App installation URL — direct user here if the app is not yet installed

post.description: Toggles the paused state of a workspace. When paused, no new runs will be started and queued runs will be held. Uses optimistic concurrency via the version field.

pause.description: True to pause, false to unpause

reason.description: Human-readable reason for the state change

version.description: Optimistic concurrency version — must match current workspace version

post.description: Reads PENDING_*.md spec files from the repository's default branch and upserts them into the control plane. Returns the count of newly synced specs.

synced_count.description: Number of specs synced in this request

get.description: Lists specs for a workspace using Stripe-style keyset pagination. Pass starting_after (spec_id of last item) to page forward.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of specs to return

parameters.name: starting_after
parameters.description: Cursor for keyset pagination. Pass the spec_id of the last item on the previous page.

has_more.description: Whether more results exist beyond this page

next_cursor.description: Cursor to pass as starting_after for the next page

post.description: Queues a new run for the given workspace. Provide either spec_id (reference an existing spec) or spec_markdown (inline spec content), but not both. The idempotency_key ensures at-most-once execution.

spec_id.description: Reference to an existing spec. Mutually exclusive with spec_markdown.

spec_markdown.description: Inline spec content in Markdown. Mutually exclusive with spec_id.

mode.description: Run mode — currently only pull_request is supported

requested_by.description: Identity of the user or system that requested the run

base_commit_sha.description: Pin the run to a specific base commit. Uses HEAD of default branch if null.

get.description: Lists runs using Stripe-style keyset pagination. Pass starting_after (run_id of last item) to page forward.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of runs to return

parameters.name: starting_after
parameters.description: Cursor for keyset pagination. Pass the run_id of the last item on the previous page.

has_more.description: Whether more results exist beyond this page

next_cursor.description: Cursor to pass as starting_after for the next page

get.description: Returns full run details including state transitions, artifacts produced by each pipeline stage, and policy events.

current_state.description: Current pipeline state (e.g. SPEC_QUEUED, ECHO_RUNNING, PR_OPENED, FAILED)

branch.description: Git branch created for this run

pr_url.description: Pull request URL, null until PR is opened

post.description: Retries a blocked or failed run. Increments the attempt counter and re-queues from the last checkpoint.

retry_token.description: Idempotency token for the retry operation

get.description: Streams the complete event history of a finished run as Server-Sent Events. Useful for replaying a run's timeline in the UI.

200.description: SSE event stream of run history

get.description: Streams live events for an in-progress run as Server-Sent Events. Connection stays open until the run completes or the client disconnects.

200.description: SSE event stream of live run progress

post.description: Cancels a queued or in-progress run. The run transitions to CANCELLED state and any active pipeline stage is aborted.

get.description: Returns the agent's profile including trust level, streak data, and improvement status.
Returns paginated agent scores using Stripe-style keyset pagination. Pass starting_after (score_id of last item) to page forward.

parameters.name: starting_after
parameters.description: Cursor for keyset pagination. Pass the score_id of the last item on the previous page.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of scores to return (default 50, max 100)

has_more.description: Whether more results exist beyond this page

next_cursor.description: Cursor to pass as starting_after for the next page

get.description: Returns a detailed improvement report including proposal counts, approval rates, and score trends. Used to assess whether the agent's self-tuning is making progress.

improvement_stalled_warning.description: True if the agent's improvement has plateaued

proposals_generated.description: Total proposals generated by the agent

proposals_rejected.description: Proposals rejected by the system or user

proposals_applied.description: Proposals successfully applied to the harness

avg_score_delta_per_applied_change.description: Average score improvement per applied proposal

baseline_tier.description: Baseline tier the agent started at

get.description: Lists self-tuning proposals generated by the agent. Each proposal represents a suggested change to the agent's harness configuration.

post.description: Approves a pending proposal, applying the proposed changes to the agent's harness configuration. Returns the resulting status — APPLIED if successful, CONFIG_CHANGED if there was a conflict, or REJECTED on validation failure.
Rejects a pending proposal with a reason. The agent uses rejection reasons to improve future proposals.

rejection_reason.description: Why the proposal was rejected — fed back to the agent for learning

post.description: Vetoes a proposal. Unlike rejection, a veto signals strong disagreement and has a larger negative weight on the agent's proposal scoring.
Reverts a previously applied harness configuration change. Creates a new config version that undoes the specified change.

proposal_id.description: Proposal that originally produced this change

reverted_from.description: Config version that contained the change

put.description: Creates or updates the harness source configuration for an agent in a workspace. This is the authoring step — the config must be compiled and activated before it takes effect.

skills.description: List of skill identifiers to enable

config_version_id.description: Version ID for this draft config

post.description: Validates and compiles a draft harness config. The compiled config is checked for skill compatibility, instruction validity, and resource constraints.

is_valid.description: True if compilation succeeded without errors

validation_report_json.description: JSON-encoded validation report with warnings and errors, null if fully valid

post.description: Activates a compiled harness config version, making it the active configuration for the agent. Only compiled configs can be activated.

get.description: Returns the currently active harness configuration for the workspace, including the compiled agent profile.

put.description: Stores or replaces the BYOK LLM API key for a workspace. The key is encrypted at rest and never returned in API responses.

api_key.description: API key for the provider — encrypted at rest, never echoed

get.description: Returns whether a BYOK LLM key is configured for the workspace and which provider it belongs to. Never returns the actual key.

has_key.description: True if an API key is stored

delete.description: Removes the stored BYOK LLM API key for the workspace. Future runs will fall back to platform-provided keys if available.

put.description: Stores a secret value for a specific skill in a workspace. Secrets are scoped to the skill and can be further scoped to host-only or sandbox-only access.

value.description: Secret value — encrypted at rest, never echoed

scope.description: Where the secret is available. Defaults to both if omitted.

meta_json.description: Optional JSON metadata for the secret (e.g. expiry, rotation info)

delete.description: Removes a specific secret for a skill in a workspace.

post.description: Streams an LLM-generated spec template based on the conversation messages. Supports tool use for interactive spec authoring. Returns Server-Sent Events.

200.description: SSE stream of LLM-generated spec content

schema.description: Server-Sent Events stream with spec template content

post.description: Streams an LLM-generated preview of a spec, showing what the agent would produce before committing. Returns Server-Sent Events.

200.description: SSE stream of LLM-generated spec preview

schema.description: Server-Sent Events stream with spec preview content

get.description: Lists all configured platform-wide LLM provider keys. These are shared keys that workspaces fall back to when no BYOK key is configured.

put.description: Configures a platform-wide LLM provider key by referencing a workspace that has a BYOK key stored. The platform key proxies through the referenced workspace's credential.

source_workspace_id.description: Workspace whose BYOK key to use as the platform key

delete.description: Removes a platform-wide LLM provider key. Workspaces without BYOK keys will no longer be able to use this provider.

post.description: Upgrades a workspace's billing plan by linking a payment provider subscription. The workspace's plan tier and billing status are updated immediately.

plan_tier.description: New plan tier (e.g. free, pro, enterprise)

post.description: Records a billing lifecycle event such as a payment failure or downgrade. The workspace's billing status is updated accordingly.

get.description: Returns a billing breakdown for a workspace: run counts grouped by lifecycle event (completed, non-billable, score-gated), plus total agent seconds and average score for gated runs. Filterable by period.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Time period for the summary window

post.description: Configures the scoring context window size for a workspace. This controls how many tokens of context are sent to the scoring model when evaluating agent output quality.

scoring_context_max_tokens.description: Maximum tokens for scoring context window (512-8192)

BearerAuth.description: Obtain a token via the CLI auth flow (POST /v1/auth/sessions) or GitHub OAuth

Transition.description: A state transition in the run pipeline

actor.description: Pipeline stage or user that triggered the transition

Artifact.description: An artifact produced during a run (e.g. plan, diff, review)

checksum_sha256.description: SHA-256 checksum of the artifact content

producer.description: Pipeline stage that produced the artifact

attempt.description: Run attempt number that produced this artifact

PolicyEvent.description: A policy evaluation event from the Warden stage

action_class.description: Classification of the action being evaluated

rule_id.description: Identifier of the policy rule that matched

actor.description: Pipeline stage that triggered the policy check

file_path.description: Path to the spec file in the repository

title.description: Spec title extracted from the document

RunSummary.description: Summary of a run for list views

pr_url.description: Pull request URL, null until PR is opened

AgentProfile.description: Agent profile including trust and improvement metadata

trust_level.description: Current trust level (e.g. low, medium, high)

trust_streak_runs.description: Number of consecutive successful runs contributing to trust

improvement_stalled_warning.description: True if the agent's self-improvement has plateaued

Proposal.description: An agent self-tuning proposal — a suggested change to the harness configuration

trigger_reason.description: Why the agent generated this proposal

proposed_changes.description: Description of the proposed configuration changes

approval_mode.description: Whether the proposal requires manual approval or can auto-apply

status.description: Proposal lifecycle status (e.g. PENDING, APPLIED, REJECTED, VETOED)

auto_apply_at.description: Timestamp when the proposal will auto-apply, null if manual approval required

PlatformKey.description: A platform-wide LLM provider key configuration

source_workspace_id.description: Workspace whose BYOK key is used

active.description: Whether this platform key is active

AgentRelayRequest.description: Request body for Agent Relay LLM endpoints (spec template and preview). The workspace_id is provided via the path parameter.

tools.description: Optional tool definitions for the LLM to use during generation

input_schema.description: JSON Schema for the tool's input
